differential_diagnoses: Disseminated viral infection (e.g., enterovirus or adenovirus)
next_steps: Complete blood count with differential, inflammatory markers (ESR, CRP)
Urinalysis to screen for hematuria or proteinuria
Dermatology consultation and skin biopsy for histopathology and direct immunofluorescence
Blood cultures and empiric antibiotic coverage for suspected sepsis/meningococcemia until ruled out
Measurement of serum albumin and transaminases

differential_diagnoses: Parvovirus B19 infection (papular-purpuric gloves and socks syndrome)
next_steps: Complete blood count with differential and peripheral blood smear
Urinalysis to check for hematuria and proteinuria
Echocardiogram to assess for coronary artery aneurysms
Blood and skin lesion cultures to rule out sepsis
Comprehensive metabolic panel including albumin, transaminases, and renal function
Dermatology consultation for punch biopsy (H&E and direct immunofluorescence)
Empiric broad-spectrum antibiotic therapy for suspected sepsis until cultures are negative
